title: oreocharis fargesii
intro: Oreocharis fargesii, also known as Farges' orchid or ghost orchid, is a species of orchid native to China. This epiphytic orchid has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant has been used to treat various health issues, such as fever, headaches, and respiratory problems, due to its health benefits of reducing inflammation and fighting off infections. Herbal preparations of Oreocharis fargesii include infusions and decoctions, which are used to treat a range of health conditions, and it is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
